sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115029" key="xruso/xroos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῡσό-χροος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, heterocl. acc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-χρόα,</foreign> <sense id="n115029.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gold-coloured,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
